completeWitness.bibliographicTitle: The Apocrypha and Pseudepigrapha of the Old Testament in English
completeWitness.internetArchiveCopyrightEvidence: no visible notice of copyright; stated date is 1913
completeWitness.pseudepigraphaMirrorCitation: R. H. Charles, APOT volume 2, pages 481-524

finding.summary: The prior online mirror blocker was real, but the complete public-domain print source has now been located as the Internet Archive scan/OCR of Charles APOT volume 2. The Pseudepigrapha.com mirror remains incomplete at the tail and must not be used alone for full source binding. The Internet Archive item supplies the complete underlying print witness from which a local source snapshot can be materialized.

candidateTailAnchorsToVerifyDuringMateri.anchor: Know, therefore, that in former times and in the generations of old our fathers had helpers
Therefore, when you receive my letter, read it carefully in your assemblies
And it happened, after I had finished all the words of this letter

nextAllowedWork: materialize the 2 Baruch section from the Internet Archive APOT volume 2 full text or PDF
compare candidate chapters 85-87 against the materialized source witness
record local source snapshot and row-level bindings before any text-trust or app-render promotion
